SearchModeSwitchButton constructor

const SearchModeSwitchButton({
  1. Key? key,
  2. required SearchResearchMode mode,
  3. required VoidCallback onTap,
  4. String tripsLabel = 'Trips',
  5. String matesLabel = 'Mates',
  6. String? tripsIconAsset,
  7. String? matesIconAsset,
  8. IconData tripsFallbackIcon = Icons.flight_takeoff_rounded,
  9. IconData matesFallbackIcon = Icons.people_alt_rounded,
  10. Color? backgroundColor,
  11. Color? borderColor,
  12. Color? iconColor,
  13. Color? labelColor,
  14. double? size,
  15. double? iconSize,
  16. double? elevation,
})

Implementation

const SearchModeSwitchButton({
  super.key,
  required this.mode,
  required this.onTap,
  this.tripsLabel = 'Trips',
  this.matesLabel = 'Mates',
  this.tripsIconAsset,
  this.matesIconAsset,
  this.tripsFallbackIcon = Icons.flight_takeoff_rounded,
  this.matesFallbackIcon = Icons.people_alt_rounded,
  this.backgroundColor,
  this.borderColor,
  this.iconColor,
  this.labelColor,
  this.size,
  this.iconSize,
  this.elevation,
});
